title: sunarpazo #4884
definition:
1) to seize by force
 2) to catch or lay hold of (one so that he is no longer his own master)
 3) to seize by force and carry away
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to seize by force
 2) to catch or lay hold of (one so that he is no longer his own master)
 3) to seize by force and carry away

    NASB:  to seize and carry away:
